name: review-family
description: Evidence-first Codex review, scrutiny, and review-adjudication skills

interface.longDescription: Run bounded, evidence-first Codex reviews across implementation, architecture, skill behavior, execution-readiness, adversarial scrutiny, pasted claims, supplied-review adjudication, and Claude PR-review prompt drafting.
defaultPrompt: Run a formal stress test of this proposal
Review this skill as a behavior contract
Review this implementation against the spec
Adjudicate this review before I act
